company: University of Arizona — Housing & Residential Life

company: University of Arizona — Campus Health Services
description: Designed comprehensive Power BI dashboard suite covering Demographics, Mental Health, AOD, Physical Health, Sexual Health, and Utilization analytics. Built end-to-end data pipelines from raw CSV to production dashboards published to the Campus Health website.

Developed RAG-based full-stack application using LLMs, OpenAI embeddings, and FAISS for semantic search. Leveraged 70B-parameter LLMs for zero-shot knowledge extraction. Collaborated with Intel researchers and co-authored publication on LLM-assisted hardware vulnerability discovery.

Performed EDA on user engagement and service adoption using Python and SQL. Built Tableau dashboards tracking KPIs across rural user segments. Analyzed regional demand patterns during COVID-19 to enable targeted service expansion in underserved communities.
